content.json:
# 🌐 Azure Arc K8s Dashboard

Real-time overview of your Arc-enabled Kubernetes cluster **{CLUSTER_NAME}** in resource group **{RESOURCE_GROUP}**.

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}'
| where name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
| project
    ['Cluster Name'] = name,
    ['Location'] = location,
    ['K8s Version'] = tostring(properties.kubernetesVersion),
    ['Distribution'] = tostring(properties.infrastructure),
    ['Provisioning State'] = tostring(properties.provisioningState),
    ['Connectivity'] = tostring(properties.connectivityStatus),
    ['Last Connectivity'] = todatetime(properties.lastConnectivityTime),
    ['Agent Version'] = tostring(properties.agentVersion),
    ['Total Nodes'] = toint(properties.totalNodeCount),
    ['Total Cores'] = toint(properties.totalCoreCount),
    ['Managed Identity'] = tostring(identity.type)
content.title: Cluster Properties

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}'
| where name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
| project
    ['Property'] = 'Cluster Name', ['Value'] = name
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Location', ['Value'] = location
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Kubernetes Version', ['Value'] = tostring(properties.kubernetesVersion)
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Infrastructure', ['Value'] = tostring(properties.infrastructure)
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Provisioning State', ['Value'] = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Connectivity Status', ['Value'] = tostring(properties.connectivityStatus)
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Last Connectivity', ['Value'] = tostring(properties.lastConnectivityTime)
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Agent Version', ['Value'] = tostring(properties.agentVersion)
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Total Nodes', ['Value'] = tostring(properties.totalNodeCount)
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Total Cores', ['Value'] = tostring(properties.totalCoreCount)
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Managed Identity', ['Value'] = tostring(identity.type)
)
| union (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
    | where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}' and name == '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
    | project ['Property'] = 'Cluster ID', ['Value'] = id
)
content.title: Cluster Details

content.query:
kubernetesconfigurationresources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetesconfiguration/extensions'
| where id contains '{CLUSTER_NAME}'
| where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}'
| extend extensionType = tostring(properties.extensionType)
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| extend autoUpgrade = tostring(properties.autoUpgradeMinorVersion)
| extend releaseTrain = tostring(properties.releaseTrain)
| extend version = tostring(properties.version)
| extend installedAt = tostring(properties.systemData.createdAt)
| project
    ['Extension Name'] = name,
    ['Type'] = extensionType,
    ['Version'] = version,
    ['State'] = provisioningState,
    ['Auto Upgrade'] = autoUpgrade,
    ['Release Train'] = releaseTrain,
    ['Installed'] = installedAt
content.title: Arc Extensions

content.query:
resources
| where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}'
| summarize Count = count() by ['Resource Type'] = type
| order by Count desc
content.title: Resources by Type

content.query:
resources
| where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}'
| project
    ['Name'] = name,
    ['Type'] = type,
    ['Location'] = location,
    ['Provisioning State'] = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| order by Type asc, Name asc
content.title: All Resources

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults'
| where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}'
| extend enableRbac = tostring(properties.enableRbacAuthorization)
| extend softDelete = tostring(properties.enableSoftDelete)
| extend vaultUri = tostring(properties.vaultUri)
| project
    ['Key Vault'] = name,
    ['URI'] = vaultUri,
    ['RBAC Enabled'] = enableRbac,
    ['Soft Delete'] = softDelete,
    ['Location'] = location
content.title: Key Vault

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.containerregistry/registries'
| where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}'
| extend sku = tostring(sku.name)
| extend loginServer = tostring(properties.loginServer)
| extend adminEnabled = tostring(properties.adminUserEnabled)
| extend dataEndpoint = tostring(properties.dataEndpointEnabled)
| project
    ['Registry'] = name,
    ['Login Server'] = loginServer,
    ['SKU'] = sku,
    ['Admin Enabled'] = adminEnabled,
    ['Data Endpoints'] = dataEndpoint,
    ['Location'] = location
content.title: Container Registry

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}'
| extend vmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize)
| extend osType = tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType)
| extend imageOffer = tostring(properties.storageProfile.imageReference.offer)
| extend imageSku = tostring(properties.storageProfile.imageReference.sku)
| extend provisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| project
    ['VM Name'] = name,
    ['Size'] = vmSize,
    ['OS'] = osType,
    ['Image'] = strcat(imageOffer, ' ', imageSku),
    ['State'] = provisioningState,
    ['Location'] = location
content.title: Virtual Machine

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.network/publicipaddresses'
| where resourceGroup == '{RESOURCE_GROUP}'
| extend ipAddress = tostring(properties.ipAddress)
| extend allocationMethod = tostring(properties.publicIPAllocationMethod)
| extend skuName = tostring(sku.name)
| project
    ['Name'] = name,
    ['IP Address'] = ipAddress,
    ['Allocation'] = allocationMethod,
    ['SKU'] = skuName
content.title: Public IP Addresses
